title: Bhai-Bhai
writer: Hargobind Duggal, Rajendra Krishan, Jawar N. Sitaraman
plot: Widowed Dayashankar is a businessman who lives in Madras with his two school-going sons, Raj and Ashok. One day he catches Raj stealing some money from his vault, he beats him, locks him in a room, and threatens to cut off his fin...
